steps.title: Make the relative clause complete
steps.content: The blank is inside a relative clause introduced by which. Since which is the subject of that clause, the blank must supply a finite verb that can serve as the clause's predicate.

steps.title: Reject non-finite verb forms
steps.content: Choice B is a participle, Choice C is an infinitive, and Choice D is another participle. None can serve as the main verb of the relative clause. The finite past-tense verb completes the sentence. The answer is A.
